title: 12 Pack Christmas Glitter Poinsettia Flowers Artificial Flower Christmas Tree Decorations and Ornaments, 16cm Diameter with Clips(purple)
features: Size: 16cm in diameter, with perfect size and light weight, easy to push them in between Christmas tree branches. It is with glitter on the flower, which make the tree more attracting.
Quantity: Set of 12 sparkling poinsettia ornaments create holiday cheer-an ideal decoration for Christmas ,party,wedding,etc. Additional 12pcs clips, which make assembling easier.

Material: The Christmas poinsettia flowers are made of durable plastic and covered with gold glitter powder.Flexible iron wired stems make them an effortlessly elegant and easy way to be used for multiple holiday decorating needs.
Christmas Decorations: Glitter poinsettias can be used for Christmas tree decorations and ornaments, Christmas garland, wedding decorations, room decorations, etc.

Wide Application: Artificial poinsettia flowers for Christmas tree , Christmas wreaths,topper and rattan to create a Christmas atmosphere.The glitter flower is also perfect for decoration on wedding party, birthday party, New Year’s holiday floral arrangement, holiday centerpiece or floral display, bouquets, arches , wedding backdrops or other festival.They will remain beautiful and glittery through the holiday season.
description: Product description Specification: Size :16cm in Diameter Color:Blue,Silver,Purple,White Package Included: 12pcs Glitter Poinsettia Flowers 12pcs Clips Note: There are glitters on the fake flowers, there is a slight drop, it is normal. Safety Warning This product may contain materials that can cause skin irritation or allergic reactions. Handle with care and keep away from children and pets.
